query:
SELECT
            id AS "call_id!",
            started_at AS "started_at!"
        FROM call_records
        WHERE
            ($2::timestamptz IS NULL OR started_at >= $2)
            AND ($3::timestamptz IS NULL OR started_at < $3)
            AND (
                $4::timestamptz IS NULL
                OR (started_at, id) > ($4, $5::uuid)
            )
        ORDER BY started_at ASC, id ASC
        LIMIT $1
